name: superhuman-agent
description: Superhuman Agent for Callour Studio — one plugin, three live senior specialists: Design, Graphic, and Dev. Connects Codex to the Superhuman Operations MCP; start-task reads and claims a task, brings in the right specialist, and conducts the work to create-report.

interface.shortDescription: Senior specialist agents for your Superhuman tasks.
interface.longDescription: Superhuman Agent is an umbrella of senior specialists that work your Superhuman Operations tasks. Live today: Design (IA, flows, wireframes, visual design, Figma, design QA), Graphic (brand and marketing systems), and Dev (implementation, tests, review). One entry, start-task, reads and claims a task, picks the right specialist, and runs the work; create-report documents the process and outcome back to the task. Operational surface only — no finance, sales, or people money. Requires a SUPERHUMAN_MCP_TOKEN env var (ask the founder for a token).
defaultPrompt: Start task <paste a task link> and walk me through it.
What does this task need — which specialist, and what's the plan?
Run the full process on this task.
